metadata.description: A collection of skills, tools, MCP servers, and plugins for your agents.

plugins.name: agent-starter
plugins.description: Scaffold and run new AI agent projects (Claude Agent SDK, OpenAI Agents SDK, Google ADK) with tools and MCP servers wired in.

plugins.name: skills-pack
plugins.description: A pack of ready-to-use engineering Agent Skills: commits, PRs, code review, tests, Dockerfiles, REST design, READMEs, changelogs, SQL optimization, and debugging.
